name: Black Bean Quesadillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the black beans.
2. Stir in the chopped tomato, cilantro, and black olive pieces.
3. Divide evenly onto half of the tortillas.
4. Sprinkle with shredded soy cheese, spinach, and hot salsa.
5. Top with remaining tortillas.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Place ungreased cookie sheet in the oven and bake for 12 minutes.
8. Cut into wedges and serve.
